characteristics.$text: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** and **^^Cavalry^^** units by **^^Retreat^^** abilities.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Deployment Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit that has not been deployed.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up that unit in reserve **in the tunnels below**. It has now been deployed.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: **^^Deploy^^**
characteristics.name: Keywords

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: You can use this ability if there are fewer than 3 friendly **Gnawholes** on the battlefield.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up a **Gnawhole** on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 1" from all other terrain features.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly non-**^^Monster Skaven^^** unit that is not in combat and was not set up this turn to use this ability.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Your Movement Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit that is **in the tunnels below** to use this ability.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a friendly **Gnawhole** and more than 9" from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: End of Any Turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: **Heal (D3)** this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 3 friendly **^^Skryre^^** units to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll a dice for each target and apply the corresponding effect:
**1 *Kaboom!:*** Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
**2-5 *More Power!:*** Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
**6 *More-more Power!:*** In addition to the effect of ‘More Power!’, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s ranged weapons for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 3 friendly non-**^^Hero Moulder^^** units to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll a dice for each target and apply the corresponding effect:
**1-2 *Self-destructive Fury:*** Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
**3-4 *Rabid Infusion:*** Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
**5-6 *Blinded by Frenzy:*** In addition to the effect of ‘Rabid Infusion’, the target has **^^Ward (5+)^^** until the start of your next turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 3 friendly **^^Pestilens^^** units that are in combat to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
For each target:
• Make a pile-in move.
• Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 3 friendly **^^Verminus^^** units that charged this turn to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
While a friendly **^^Skaven Daemon^^** is within the combat range of a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit:
• That **^^Skaven Daemon^^** has **^^Ward (4+)^^**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for that **^^Skaven Daemon^^**, allocate 1 mortal damage on a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit within that unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for that unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for these damage points).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘Redeploy’ command for a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text:
Pick up to 2 other friendly **^^Skaven^^** units that are not in combat and are wholly within 13"
of the unit using the ‘Redeploy’ command to be the targets. Each target must have at least one of the following keywords: **^^Verminus^^**, **^^Skryre^^**, **^^Moulder^^**, **^^Pestilens^^**, **^^Eshin^^**. After that ‘Redeploy’ command has been resolved, each of the targets can immediately use the ‘Redeploy’ command in an order of your choice without any command points being spent.
characteristics.name: Effect
Timing
characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Deployment Phase

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy **^^Hero^^** to be the target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: For the rest of the battle, if the target has been destroyed, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **^^Eshin^^** units.
Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly **^^Skaven^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit:
• This unit has **^^Ward (4+)^^**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Your Hero Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **^^Moulder^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Deployment Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick another friendly **^^Skaven Hero^^** on the battlefield with a Health characteristic that equals or exceeds this unit’s Health characteristic to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
For the rest of the battle:
• While the target has not been slain, friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** units have **^^Ward (6+)^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
• Once the target has been slain, add 2 to charge rolls for friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: You can re-roll the random characteristic rolls for the Move characteristic of friendly **^^Skryre War Machines^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit. In addition, each time a friendly **^^Skryre War Machine^^** wholly within 18" of this unit uses the ‘Rolling Doom’ or ‘Whirling Doom’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted, if any.
characteristics.name: Effect
